if_not_mounted_return_null.note: No components gate render on a mounted flag — no hydration-blank risk from this pattern.

raw_img_tags.note: All images already use next/image — good baseline.

issues.issue: Avatar <Image width={64} height={64}> has no sizes prop. Minor — fixed-size images don't strictly need sizes, but adding sizes='64px' avoids generating unneeded srcset candidates.
Arrow icon <Image width={25} height={16}> has no sizes prop. Tiny SVG icons — low impact.

video_preload_issues.issue: Hero video uses preload="auto" — forces browser to fully buffer the showreel MP4 on page load, blocking bandwidth for critical assets.

Two identical autoPlay video elements rendered simultaneously (desktop + mobile layouts). Both reference showreel2026.mp4. Doubles the video network requests unless browser de-dupes. preload="none" means autoPlay may stall on some browsers.
video_preload_issues.fix: Replace both with LazyVideo component using IntersectionObserver. Only render/load video when in viewport.

blank_page_hypotheses.hypothesis: framer-motion whileInView with initial:{opacity:0} — if the element is above the fold when JS initialises, the IntersectionObserver fires immediately and the animation runs fine. But if JS is slow, the element starts invisible and stays blank until JS executes.
blank_page_hypotheses.mitigation: Already using useReducedMotion guard. The fix is to ensure critical above-fold content uses initial animate (not whileInView) and only non-LCP sections use whileInView.

blank_page_hypotheses.hypothesis: Large showreel2026.mp4 blocks main thread parsing on slower connections
blank_page_hypotheses.mitigation: LazyVideo component + preload=metadata or none until viewport

primary_color_token.status: found — using var(--token-color-primary, #D2D2D6) in placeholder CSS

next_config_image_settings.assessment: Good. deviceSizes covers all srcset breakpoints. imageSizes includes project-specific 533px and 684px values. No changes needed.

components_updated: src/components/Hero/Hero.tsx — video preload fix + OptimizedImage for image type
src/components/BookCall/BookCall.tsx — LazyVideo for both showreel instances
